description_long: This is a full-size football featuring the colors and emblem of the Mexican flag, with green, white, and red panels and the national coat of arms prominently displayed. One side of the ball displays the FIFA World Cup Russia 2018 logo, indicating a commemorative or themed design. The surface is made of synthetic leather with a visible grain texture, and the panels are stitched together in a traditional pattern. The ball is inflated, giving it a firm, rounded shape, and the seams are slightly raised, typical of high-quality footballs. The colors are vibrant, and the graphics are sharply printed, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A vibrant, full-size football with Mexican flag colors, national emblem, and FIFA World Cup Russia 2018 logo, made of textured synthetic leather with stitched panels.
description_view_0: This view highlights the Mexican coat of arms centered on the white panel, flanked by green and red panels.
description_view_1: This view shows a solid red panel with surrounding white panels, with no visible logos or emblems.
description_view_2: This view features the FIFA World Cup Russia 2018 logo and text, bordered by green and red panels.
description_view_3: This view displays a solid green panel with adjacent white panels, without any logos or emblems.
